questions.question: What is 2 + 3?
questions.explanation: When you add 2 and 3 together, you get 5! Try counting on your fingers.

questions.question: How many apples are there in a group of 3 apples and another group of 2 apples?
How many sides does a triangle have?
questions.explanation: A triangle has 3 sides. That's where it gets its name - TRI means 3!
hints: Think of the corners of the shape
